title: Check passport validity
why_it_matters: Passport issues can affect boarding and entry.
fallback_option: Confirm requirements and renew if needed.

title: Save visa or entry documents
why_it_matters: You may need to show entry-related documents at multiple points.
risk_if_missing: Delays or confusion at airport or immigration.

title: Save flight confirmations offline
why_it_matters: Important if network is weak or unavailable.
risk_if_missing: Trouble proving bookings or checking details.

title: Save hotel confirmations offline
why_it_matters: Needed for arrival, check-in, and taxi support.

title: Create one offline travel folder
why_it_matters: Keeps key materials in one place during stressful moments.
fallback_option: Use a dedicated photo album for screenshots.

title: Decide your main payment method
why_it_matters: Payment is one of the most important travel basics.
fallback_option: Use a backup card or emergency cash.

title: Prepare a backup payment method
why_it_matters: Your main method may fail unexpectedly.
risk_if_missing: You may get stuck during transport or meals.
fallback_option: Carry a second card and some cash.

title: Test your payment setup before departure
why_it_matters: Problems are easier to solve before flying.

title: Carry a small emergency cash backup
why_it_matters: Useful if digital payment is temporarily unavailable.

title: Decide your internet access plan
why_it_matters: You need connectivity for maps, bookings, and communication.
fallback_option: Use airport or hotel Wi-Fi temporarily.

title: Set up your connection before flying
why_it_matters: Setup is easier before travel stress begins.
risk_if_missing: First hours may be wasted troubleshooting.
fallback_option: Ask hotel staff for help later.

title: Save key information offline
why_it_matters: You may not be connected immediately after landing.
risk_if_missing: Harder to reach hotel or verify plans.

title: Install your core travel apps
why_it_matters: Installing too late adds stress.
fallback_option: Use browser or ask for help.

title: Know what each app is for
why_it_matters: Too many unfamiliar apps create confusion.
risk_if_missing: You may open the wrong tool in urgent moments.
fallback_option: Keep a simple app cheat sheet.

title: Save your hotel address in Chinese
why_it_matters: One of the most useful tools for first arrival.

title: Plan your airport-to-hotel route
why_it_matters: Arrival is stressful, and deciding on the spot is harder.
risk_if_missing: Delays, confusion, and a worse first impression.

title: Prepare for city-to-city transitions
why_it_matters: Multi-city trips have more operational complexity.
risk_if_missing: Higher chance of missed or messy transitions.
fallback_option: Keep route notes and booking screenshots.

title: Save hotel name, address, and phone
why_it_matters: Needed for check-in, taxi, and problem recovery.
risk_if_missing: Harder to reach and confirm your hotel.

title: Check your arrival time against hotel check-in
why_it_matters: Prevents early-arrival or late-arrival uncertainty.

title: Prepare a taxi or driver card
why_it_matters: Very high real-world utility.

title: Prepare a hotel check-in card
why_it_matters: Reduces stress at arrival.

title: Prepare an ask-for-help card
why_it_matters: Helps in uncertain moments.

title: Prepare a please-speak-slowly card
why_it_matters: Useful across many service scenarios.

title: Prepare your food restriction card
why_it_matters: Prevents misunderstandings around diet or religion.
risk_if_missing: Risk of wrong ingredients or stress around meals.

title: Plan your first easy meal
why_it_matters: Arrival day is not the best time for complex food decisions.
fallback_option: Ask hotel staff for something simple nearby.

title: Prepare an emergency fallback plan
why_it_matters: Recovery matters as much as preparation.
risk_if_missing: Small failures can become major stress.
fallback_option: Keep paper backups and hotel contact.

title: Share your itinerary with someone you trust
why_it_matters: Helpful if you need support from afar.
fallback_option: Email itinerary to yourself and one contact.

title: Prepare a charging plan for your phone
why_it_matters: Your phone is your most important travel tool.
risk_if_missing: Loss of navigation, payments, and booking access.

title: Before landing, review your first 3 steps
why_it_matters: Reduces arrival panic.
fallback_option: Open your prep pack after landing.

title: Confirm your internet works as early as possible
why_it_matters: Connectivity unlocks many other tasks.
fallback_option: Use airport Wi-Fi or service desk.

title: Open your hotel info before leaving the airport
why_it_matters: You will need it for transport and confirmation.

title: Choose your transport option before exiting
why_it_matters: Better than deciding under pressure outside.
fallback_option: Ask airport staff for the simplest option.

title: Keep your destination address easy to show
why_it_matters: Essential in your first real interaction.

title: Keep one backup payment option ready during your first ride
why_it_matters: First transport is not the time to improvise.
